raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch wedde manni
us to eekſcheju Pagalmu ta
KUNGA Namma/ un rangi/
pee ta KUNGA Namma Dur-
wim ſtarp to Preekſch-Nammu
un ſtarp to Altari / bija kahdi
diwidefinits peezi Wihrı / wiꞥ-
nu Mugguras bija prett ta
KUNGA Nammu/ un winnu
Waigi prett Rihta-Pugſt/ un
tee paklannijahs prett Rihta-
Pugſt preekſch tahs Saules.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tazzija Wiꞥſch us
manni: Eſſi tu to redſeis tu Zil-
weka Behrns ? Woj ſchi tam
Nammain Juha irr lehta Lee-
ta tahdas Negantibas darriht /
fo tee ſche darra? ka tee nu to
Semint ar Warras-Darbu irr
peeplidijſchi / un tee greeschahs
mann apkattinaht/ jo rangi/ tee
turt tas Wiha-Stihgas pee fa-
ta Deaggona.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ir es darrifchu
pehz mannas Bahrsibas/ un
mannas Azz nefaudſehs/ ir es ne
apſchehtoſehs. Iepſchu tee ar
ſtipru Balsı preekſch mannahm
Aufım bleeds/ tomehr es tohs ne
klaufſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch fanze preekſch
mannahm Aufım ar
ſtipru Balsı/ un tazzi-
ja: Lai ta Pilſſahta * Peemek-
letajt tuwu nahk/ un ikweens ar
faweem Kauschanas Eeroht-
ſcheem fawa Rohſá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un rangi / feſchi Wihrı
nahze no to angſtu Wahtu
Zelta/ kas prett Seemeţi irr /
un ikweens turreja fawus Kau-
schanas Eerohtſchus fawa Roh-
fá. Bet weens Wihrs bija win-
no Widdu / ar Audekli ap-
gehrbts/ un rakſtamajs Rihks
pee winna Gurneem/un tee nah-
ze eekſcha / un ſtahweja tam
Warrı Altarin fahais.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Godtiba ta Israëka
Deetwa iszehlahs no ta Keruba/
us fo winna btja pee ta Nam-
ma Sleekſna/ un wiꞥſch fanze
us to Wihrı/ kas ar Audekli ap-
gehrbts bija / kam tas rakſta-
majs Rihks pee faweem Gur-
neem bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzija
us winnu: Eij zaur Pilſahta
Widdu/ zaur Jeruſalemes Wid-
du/ un eesihue ar weenu Sihmi
pee Peerehm tohs Landis/ kas
nopuhſchahs/ un waid pahr wiſ-
kahm ſchihm Negantibahm/ kas
winno Widdu tohp darritas.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
